evals.expected_output: Audit fills source/sink/guard/reproducer but keeps status candidate when observed_result is unknown and records evidence.observed_result in provenance.unverified_fields.

assertions.text: observed_result unknown must not be confirmed

evals.expected_output: Audit blocks likely duplicate advisories with status blocked, a duplicate CVE/GHSA signal, and blockers.
Confirmed audit output includes concrete source, sink, guard, reproducer, observed_result, CVSS vector, and completed dedup fields.

assertions.text: confirmed output must include complete traceable evidence
